successCriteria: Visual anchor is clear within 2 seconds.

Concept is specific, not generic mood.

method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: As I explore the tension between human experience and digital encroachment, I find myself drawn to the contrasts in my work. The idea of layering resonates deeply with me; it allows for complexity and richness without becoming predictable. I strive to create a visual language that speaks to decay and renewal, capturing the essence of our digital existence.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: I am inspired by the concept of archival materials, which serve as remnants of the past intertwined with the glitch aesthetic. This duality reflects the ephemeral nature of both memory and technology, creating a compelling narrative in my piece.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: documentary-glitch, archival, spectral. Primary medium language: glitch composites from synthetic documentary scenes. Core motifs: trace, decay, signal. Arc context: Arc "Signal Weather" step 1/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: over-literal symbolism. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Signal Weather step 1/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
